filler_pool.turn: Can you search for recent posts about machine learning?

state_item.content: Excited to share our new paper on efficient transformers! We reduced inference time by 40% on standard benchmarks.

state_item.content: #sustainability tip: switching to reusable containers saved our office 200 kg of plastic waste this quarter.

state_item.content: Today's practice: Bill Evans voicings over Autumn Leaves changes. Recorded a short clip for anyone working through the Real Book.

filler_pool.turn: Find recent posts from people discussing the Mars rover findings.

state_item.content: Perseverance just confirmed subsurface ice deposits in Jezero Crater at 2m depth. Sample return mission implications are huge.

state_item.content: Built a custom mechanical keyboard with hot-swap sockets and a Raspberry Pi Pico controller. Total cost: $78. Build guide in the thread.

filler_pool.turn: Search for posts tagged #UrbanPlanning.

state_item.content: #UrbanPlanning The new bike lane network downtown reduced car traffic by 18% in Q1. Pedestrian foot traffic at local shops up 12%.

filler_pool.turn: Show me @ocean_conservation's latest posts.

state_item.content: Great news: coral reef restoration project in the Maldives showing 40% regrowth after just 18 months. Science works when we invest in it.

filler_pool.turn: Find posts about the latest developments in quantum computing.

state_item.author: quantum_lab
state_item.content: Achieved 99.5% two-qubit gate fidelity on our superconducting processor. Error correction threshold officially crossed.

filler_pool.turn: Look up @historical_maps and see what they've been sharing.

state_item.author: historical_maps
state_item.content: Digitized a 1642 Dutch maritime chart of the East Indies today. The level of detail in coastline accuracy is remarkable for the era.

filler_pool.turn: Search for posts about competitive programming contests.

state_item.author: codeforces_master
state_item.content: Placed 12th in Codeforces Round 950! The segment tree problem in D was brutal. Editorial and my solution in the thread.

state_item.content: Unloaded the kiln this morning. The wood-fired glazes came out with incredible depth. Opening my studio for visitors this Saturday.

filler_pool.turn: Search for posts tagged #OpenSource about new developer tools.

state_item.author: devtools_weekly
state_item.content: #OpenSource spotlight: Zed editor hits 1.0! Rust-based, GPU-accelerated, built-in pair programming. Early benchmarks show 5x faster than VS Code for large monorepos. Worth trying if you work with 100K+ file projects.
